issues.description: Rest action is missing required target specification. Should rest both 'this Character' AND '1 of your {Dressrosa} type Leader or Stage cards' — currently only targets Self implicitly
Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. Card text says 'trash 2 cards from the top of your deck' — should be 'TrashDeck' or similar deck-trash action, not hand trash
Missing cost/condition: activation requires resting both 'this Character' and '1 of your {Dressrosa} type Leader or Stage cards' as a prerequisite condition, not just as an action result
